name: The City Golf - Sherman Oaks
about: The City Golf operates a premium indoor golf facility with locations in Los Angeles, Sherman Oaks, and West LA. The venue utilizes Foresight's GCQuad and Falcon launch monitors to provide precise ball-flight and club-head data analysis. It features fully equipped bays and a Performance Center offering club fitting and instruction. Customers must bring their own clubs as no rentals are available. The facility is designed for refining one's game with professional-grade feedback regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GCQuad and Falcon launch monitor technology for precise data tracking
Professional-grade feedback and analysis for game improvement
Fully equipped bays available day or night, unaffected by weather
On-site Performance Center with PGA/LPGA tour fitting expertise
